5688 temporary posts in the accompanying returns A to D proposed for extension.
From date 01.03.2026 to date 31.08.2026, subject to the following terms and conditions:
Approval is being given to continue: -
1. Vacancies for more than six months in temporary posts other than executive posts.
The extension is being granted subject to the assumption of non-existence.

should be followed.

The maximum number of such posts will be automatically cancelled from the date of incorporation.
